name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: "Report something that is broken or behaving unexpectedly"
title: "[BUG] <short description>"
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

## ✅ Expected Behavior

<!-- What you expected to happen. -->

## ❌ Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happened. Include error messages verbatim. -->

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

<!-- Minimal reproduction steps. The simpler, the better. -->

## 📸 Screenshots / Screen Recording

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem. -->

## 🖥️ Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 126 |
| OS | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22 |
| Node version | `node -v` output |
| PocketBase version | Check `apps/pocketbase/.pocketbase-version` |
| Deployment | Local / Production (Vercel + Fly.io) |

  - PocketBase terminal output
  - Fly.io logs: `flyctl logs -a imigrar-espanha-pb`
